revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23993722414|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)]] {{Infobox ancient site |name=Jizōzuka Kofun |image=[[File:Jizozuka Kofun (Gyoda), funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Kofun mound | part_of={{ill|Q11616287|qid=Q11616287|1=Wakakodama Kofun Cluster}} |Other names= |location={{ill|Gyoda|qid=Q860659|1=Gyōda}} |coordinates={{Coord|36.14769444444445|N|139.48705555555554|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |type={{ill|Hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square tomb) |built=Mid to late {{ill|7th century|en|7th century|qid=Q8089|lt=7th century|1=7th century}} |area=28m on each side, 4.5m in height |Historic Site=Prefectural Historic Site: "Jizōzuka Kofun"{{Cite web|author=Gyoda City Board of Education, Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.gyoda.lg.jp/41/03/10/bunkazai_itiran/jizoudukakofun.html|title=Jizōzuka Kofun|work=Gyoda City|date=2015-pp-02|accessdate=2020-07-18|en}} |burial={{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (corridor-style stone chamber) |burial goods={{ill|Tetsuzoku|ja|鉄鏃|1=Iron arrowheads|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tetsuzoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Iron arrowheads|qq=}} fragments, {{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|qid=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery|1=Sue pottery}} fragments |Interred_individual= |notes={{ill|Decorated kofun|en|Decorated kofun|qid=Q11626716|lt=Decorated kofun|1=Decorated kofun}} |map={{location map|Japan Saitama|label=Jizōzuka Kofun|mark=方墳.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=|en}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|en}} |architectural_styles={{ill|square kofun|qid=Q11504353|1=Square Kofun}} }} '''Jizōzuka Kofun''' (地蔵塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=kofun|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofun) located in {{ill|Gyōda|en|Gyōda|qid=Q860659|lt=Gyoda|1=Gyōda}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}} Fujiharamachi. Its type is {{ill|hōfun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hōfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (square tomb), and it is part of the {{ill|Wakakodama Kofun Cluster|ja|若小玉古墳群|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakakodama Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. The site has been designated a prefectural historic site. == Overview == Jizōzuka Kofun is a square tomb measuring 28 meters on each side and 4.5 meters in height. A surrounding moat is about 1 meter wide and 0.4–0.5 meters deep. The kofun is named after the Jizō Hall enshrined on its mound. On March 29, 1963 ({{ill|1963|en|1963|qid=Q2755|lt=Showa 38|1=1963}}), it was designated as a historic site by Saitama Prefecture. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (corridor-style stone chamber) constructed with {{ill|Greenschist|ja|緑泥片岩|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Greenschist|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 緑色片岩|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 緑色片岩|1=Greenschist|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q917402}} for the rear wall and ceiling stones, and {{ill|Andesite|ja|角閃石安山岩|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Andesite|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安山岩|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安山岩|1=Andesite|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q181908}} for the other sections. * Chamber dimensions: Main chamber length: 4.1 meters; width at the center: 3.6 meters; rear wall width: 1.8 meters; height: 2.4 meters. The walls of the chamber feature {{ill|petroglyphs|ja|線刻画|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/petroglyphs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, which are the only ones of their kind in northern {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|qid=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}}. The petroglyphs depict a person wearing an {{ill|eboshi|ja|烏帽子|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/eboshi|qq=}}, horses, waterfowl, and what appears to be a house. The construction date is estimated to be from the mid to late {{ill|7th century|en|7th century|qid=Q8089|lt=7th century|1=7th century}}. The stone chamber is locked to protect the murals, but a replica is on display at the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore|en|Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore|qid=Q11248611|lt=Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore|1=Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore}}. File:Jizozuka Kofun (Gyoda), funcho.jpg|Jizō Hall at the kofun's summit File:地蔵塚古墳 (行田市) 線刻画 (複製).JPG|Petroglyph replica
{{small|Exhibited at the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore|en|Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore|qid=Q11248611|lt=Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore|1=Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore}}.|en}} [[ja:地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)]] == References == {{Reflist|en}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=Gyoda City Board of Education|title=Preservation and Maintenance Report for the Prefectural Historic Site Jizōzuka Kofun|publisher=Gyoda City|year=1986|date=1986-03|ncid=BA80349551|en}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Jizozuka Kofun (Gyoda)|en}} * [https://sakitama-muse.spec.ed.jp/%E5%9F%BC%E7%8E%89%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B/%E5%91%A8%E8%BE%BA%E3%81%AE%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E6%A1%88%E5%86%85 "Guide to Nearby Kofun" - Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore] {{Kofun navbar}} {{citation needed|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (笛吹市)|version=101315394|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:地蔵塚古墳 (笛吹市)]] [[ja:地蔵塚古墳]] {{translated page|ja|地蔵塚古墳 (行田市)|version=97951728|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Jizozuka Kofun (Gyoda)}} {{wikidata link|Q11424667}} [[Category:Decorated kofun]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
